rooms.label: Kitchen
rooms.constraints: NKBA: work triangle 13-26ft total. 48in aisle (42in single cook)

rooms.label: Primary Bedroom
rooms.constraints: King 76×80 + 24in clearance + walk-in closet access. Typical 12×16ft

rooms.label: Walk-in Closet
rooms.constraints: Walk-in: 24in rod depth + 36in clearance. Min 5×5ft practical

rooms.label: Bathroom
rooms.constraints: NKBA: tub/shower + toilet + vanity. 30in clearance to opposite wall

rooms.label: Entry
rooms.constraints: Exterior door (36in ADA) + coat hooks. Min 42in wide for flow
